ResourceHeader.AlternateName: Bureau Central De Magnetisme Terrestre France

RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description:
Our mission is to provide ground-based geomagnetic observations and data products of the highest quality.
The BCMT operates the French National Magnetic Observatory, located in Chambon-la-Forêt (Loiret, France), a network of 18 overseas observatories and a network of 11 repeat stations in metropolitan France.
You will find on this site all the data collected (raw magnetic measurements as well as various data products derived from these measurements).

InformationURL.Name: Bureau Central De Magnetisme Terrestre France Homepage
HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
